name: Beast Master: Mutually Exclusive Companion Features
mechanicalSummary: Beast Master at L3 grants both 'Ranger's Companion' (2014 PHB) and 'Primal Companion' (Tasha's Cauldron optional replacement). These are mutually exclusive rules variants. The app currently lists both as separate features.

evidence.pointer: beast-master L3 features: Ranger's Companion and Primal Companion both present
BUG-6: Beast Master lists both 2014 and Tasha's companion features

notes: Must resolve to one ruleset (2014 SRD Ranger's Companion or Tasha's Primal Companion). Mixed content from two different editions of the same subclass feature.

name: Monk: Mixed 2014/2024 Terminology
mechanicalSummary: Feature is named 'Ki' (2014 terminology) but feature descriptions in the app use 'focus points' (2024 terminology). This is inconsistent within the 2014 ruleset.

evidence.pointer: Feature name: 'Ki'; description references 'focus points' in featureDescriptions
Monk terminology note: Ki (2014) vs focus points (2024) inconsistent

notes: For 2014 production ruleset, all references should use 'Ki' or 'ki points', not 'focus points'.

name: Arcane Domain Cleric: Empty Subclass
mechanicalSummary: The Arcane Domain subclass exists in subclasses.json but the class-progression-audit flagged it as having empty features. Current data shows it does have features listed.

evidence.pointer: arcane-domain now has features in subclasses.json (Arcane Initiate at L1, CD: Arcane Abjuration at L2, etc.)
BUG-2: Arcane Domain flagged as empty

notes: Audit may be outdated; features appear populated in current data. Verify that all features are present and correctly leveled.

name: Cleric subclassFeatureLevels Missing Level 2
mechanicalSummary: Cleric's subclassFeatureLevels in subclasses.json is [1,6,8,17] but should be [1,2,6,8,17] because all cleric domains grant a Channel Divinity option at level 2.

evidence.pointer: Cleric subclassFeatureLevels: [1,6,8,17] — missing level 2
BUG-2 Part B: subclassFeatureLevels missing level 2

notes: While not currently consumed by component code, this is a data integrity defect.

name: Bard L10 Expertise: Wrong Pick Count
mechanicalSummary: Expertise at L10 should grant 2 additional skill expertises (like L3), but the app currently gives only 1 pick.

evidence.pointer: EXPERTISE_COUNTS: bard L10 gives 1 pick (should be 2 per 2014 SRD)
SYSTEMIC-2: Bard L10 Expertise count wrong

name: Rogue L6 Expertise: Wrong Pick Count
mechanicalSummary: Expertise at L6 should grant 2 additional skill expertises (like L1), but the app currently gives only 1 pick.

evidence.pointer: EXPERTISE_COUNTS: rogue L6 gives 1 pick (should be 2 per 2014 SRD)
SYSTEMIC-2: Rogue L6 Expertise count wrong

name: Rogue Sneak Attack Combat Action Hardcoded to 1d6
mechanicalSummary: The 'Sneak strike' combat action in ruleset.ts is hardcoded to '1d8 + DEX + 1d6'. While classActionsAtLevel dynamically resolves the dice count for display, the static definition is misleading.

evidence.pointer: Line 1432-1435: Sneak strike combat action hardcoded formula; classActionsAtLevel resolves correctly

notes: The runtime resolution via classActionsAtLevel is correct but the static definition should perhaps reflect that it scales.

name: Druid: Archdruid Capstone Has No Feature Description
mechanicalSummary: The level 20 Archdruid feature fell back to generic placeholder text. Now has a proper description but verify it's accurate: 'You can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times.'

evidence.pointer: featureDescriptions: Archdruid now has description
BUG-3: Archdruid had no description (appears fixed)

notes: May be resolved — feature description is present in current ruleset.ts. Verify accuracy against 2014 SRD.

name: Warlock Missing 'More invocations' at Level 12
mechanicalSummary: 2014 SRD Warlock gets 6 invocations at L12, but the app's level 12 only shows 'Ability Score Improvement'. This means invocations lag behind permanently by one.

evidence.pointer: Warlock L12 missing More invocations in ruleset.ts (appears fixed in current version)
BUG-9: Missing L12 invocation

notes: May be resolved — current ruleset.ts data shows L12 includes 'More invocations'. Verify.

name: Artificer Missing 'Infuse Item improvement' at Level 6
mechanicalSummary: TCE Infuse Item increases from 2 to 3 infused items at L6, but the app's L6 features only show 'Tool Expertise'. The L6 infusion improvement was missing.

evidence.pointer: Artificer L6 now includes Infuse Item improvement (appears fixed)
BUG-11: Missing L6 Infuse Item improvement

notes: May be resolved — current ruleset.ts data shows L6 includes 'Infuse Item improvement'. Verify.

name: 12 of 13 Classes Missing explicit subclassLevel in ruleset.ts
mechanicalSummary: Only Artificer explicitly sets subclassLevel in ruleset.ts. The other 12 classes rely on fallback logic (?? 3). Classes with non-3 subclass levels (Cleric L1, Druid L2, Sorcerer L1, Warlock L1, Wizard L2) need explicit subclassLevel values.

evidence.pointer: Only Artificer (line ~1560) sets subclassLevel; 12 others use fallback in HeroSheet
SYSTEMIC-1: subclassLevel missing from 12 classes

notes: HeroSheet.tsx uses heroClass.subclassLevel ?? 3 as fallback. Affects subclass prompts and level-down logic for Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, and Wizard.

name: Ranger Missing Simple Weapons Proficiency
mechanicalSummary: Ranger proficiencies list martial weapons but not simple weapons. The 2014 SRD grants rangers proficiency with both.

evidence.pointer: Ranger proficiencies at line 1392: missing 'Simple weapons'
BUG-5: Ranger missing simple weapons

notes: Current ruleset.ts line 1392: proficiencies: ['Light armor', 'Medium armor', 'Shields', 'Simple weapons', 'Martial weapons'] — appears fixed.
